resolution: Education capital work study report was presented at February 12 meeting as scheduled
Semi-annual departmental reports were presented at February 12 meeting as scheduled
Courthouse architect selection was presented and voted on at February 12 meeting
Board formally rejected City of Brevard's downtown overlay district proposal at February 12 meeting
Courthouse architect contract with Sizemore was approved at April 22 meeting
FY 2025 recommended budget was presented at May 13 meeting as scheduled
Public hearing for FY 2025 budget was held at May 28 meeting as scheduled
Quarter-cent sales tax discussion occurred at July 8 meeting and was delayed until 2026
Chase McKelvey was appointed as County Commissioner at July 8 meeting as scheduled
Chase McKelvey was appointed and sworn in as County Commissioner at July 8 meeting
Legislative goals were approved via resolution at July 8 meeting
Legislative goals were finalized and approved at July 8 meeting
Board voted against proceeding with quarter-cent sales tax referendum, delaying until 2026
FY 2026 recommended budget was presented at May 27 meeting as scheduled
FY 2026 budget copies were made available to public as scheduled by May 28
Fire department funding options were presented at June 23 public hearing
Budget ordinance with fire department funding was prepared and both hearings were advertised
Manager mentioned emailing commissioners about capital workshop scheduling but no meeting date confirmed yet
Courthouse site layout and elevation renderings were presented in July meetings
Public hearing for motorized vehicle ordinance was held at September 22 meeting
Ex officio County Commissioner appointment language was inserted into TNRC bylaws as approved
Signs were posted at Gallimore Road park property regarding vehicle ordinance restrictions
MOU with City of Brevard was approved and will be forwarded for review and adoption
MOU with Town of Rosman was approved and will be forwarded for consideration and adoption
LGC response letter was prepared and approved by Board at December 8 meeting
